name: Mid-Career 'Identity-Safe' Pivot Frameworks
description: Highly skilled professionals (Tech/Software/Child Welfare) find themselves 'trapped' in careers they chose at 18. They want to leave but feel their skills are non-transferable and fear 'starting over' from zero, often leads to 'failing upwards' into more misery just for the benefits.
pain_points: Feeling like a 'one-trick pony' after 8+ years in one field
Fear of the 'loss of status' when switching to blue-collar or creative work
